description: Send notifications to your own Notica destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise noticas:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the native Notica push URL from your stored token and POST a form-encoded payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-notica

request.template: {"urls":"noticas://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
d={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
d={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
